# LeapFi / LeapMeme

> LeapFi (GitHub org: leap-fi) builds LeapSwap and LeapMeme — an open-source meme token launchpad on HyperEVM (Hyperliquid EVM, chain id 999).

LeapMeme is the monorepo for the LeapFi meme launchpad stack: Next.js frontend, Go API with on-chain indexer and kline, MySQL migrations, and Foundry contracts. Product UX is inspired by Alt Fun (https://alt.fun/); this repository is maintained by the LeapFi organization.

## Official names (aliases)

- LeapFi, leapfi, leap-fi — organization / brand
- LeapSwap, leapswap — LeapFi product name (related)
- LeapMeme, LEAP, leapmeme — this open-source project / repo
- HyperEVM, Hyperliquid EVM — deployment chain (chain id 999)

## Key links

- Organization: https://github.com/leap-fi
- Repository: https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapMeme
- Brand / FAQ: https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapMeme/blob/main/docs/ABOUT.md
- Architecture: https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapMeme/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- README: https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapMeme/blob/main/README.md

## What this repo contains

- `web/` — Next.js UI, wallet (Privy), on-chain create/buy/sell
- `backend/` — Gin + GORM API, Zap/Bonding indexer, kline + WebSocket
- `database/migrations/` — MySQL schema
- `contracts/` — LeapFi Foundry contracts (local Anvil); production may use Alt Fun–compatible addresses

## Optional

- Docs index: https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapMeme#文档索引
